issues.description: _get_price_from_dexes function signature on line 728 lacks type annotations for some arguments (token, block, ignore_pools parameters). mypy reports 'Function is missing a type annotation for one or more arguments' under strict mode. These are pre-existing upstream issues that were not introduced by this feature but the new function also lacks them.
issues.suggestedFix: Add type annotations: token: ChecksumAddress, block: BlockNumber, ignore_pools: tuple[Pool, ...] to _get_price_from_dexes signature.

issues.description: _get_price_from_api function on line 706 lacks a return type annotation. mypy reports 'Function is missing a return type annotation'.
issues.suggestedFix: Add return type annotation: -> UsdPrice | None

issues.description: Missing return statement detected by mypy at line 318 (_get_price function) and line 82 (get_price function). These appear to be related to the overloaded function signatures not being recognized as exhaustive by mypy, a pre-existing issue in the codebase.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider adding explicit return None at end of functions or adding noqa comments if pre-existing.

issues.description: The source string format for Chainlink is 'Chainlink feed for 0x....' but the feature description specified 'Chainlink {pair} feed {feed_address}'. The pair name (e.g., ETH/USD) is not included in the source string because it would require an additional async call to get the pair name from the feed contract. The current implementation is reasonable but slightly less informative than specified.
issues.suggestedFix: Consider fetching feed description from Chainlink aggregator or using just 'Chainlink feed for {addr_short}' as is currently implemented - acceptable tradeoff.

issues.description: The 'wrapped gas coin' bucket source says 'Wrapped gas coin pricing for {addr_short}' but could say 'Wrapped ETH (WETH) via underlying ETH price' for better readability.

summary: The trade-path-integration feature successfully wires PriceResult into magic.py and all pricing source callers. Every major pricing bucket (atoken, balancer, chainlink, compound, convex, curve, yearn, stablecoin, one-to-one, wsteth, uniswap v2 LP, DEX fallback, etc.) now returns a descriptive source string. The DB cache layer correctly stores only the numeric price and reconstructs PriceResult on cache hits. Decimal() calls were fixed across 7 files with Decimal(float(price)). Tests cover _shorten_address helper and source string patterns for all major buckets (31 tests, all passing). The source strings are human-readable and do not contain raw object repr strings. Minor non-blocking type annotation issues were found (pre-existing pattern in the codebase).
